steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Electro Aco Altona
from math import isfinite

# Given values
shares = 22500.0
price = 12.0

# Balance sheet latest (2025-03-31)
ativo_total = 644494000.0
ativo_circulante = 276196000.0
caixa = 10115000.0
aplic_fin = 68000.0
contas_receber = 120597000.0
estoques = 97157000.0
tributos_rec = 44135000.0

passivo_circulante = 216695000.0
fornecedores = 31135000.0
emprestimos_curto = 73149000.0
outras_obrig = 37812000.0

passivo_nao_circulante = 90747000.0
emprestimos_longo = 35581000.0

patrimonio_liq = 337052000.0

# Income statement quarter comparisons and annual
# Quarter Q1 2024 (penultimo) and Q1 2025 (ultimo)
rev_q1_2024 = 128901000.0
rev_q1_2025 = 152175000.0

# Annual 2024
rev_2024 = 564238000.0

# EBIT
ebit_q1_2024 = 20990000.0
ebit_q1_2025 = 41240000.0
ebit_2024 = 101077000.0

# Net income
net_q1_2024 = 13398000.0
net_q1_2025 = 41606000.0
net_2024 = 66541000.0

# Resultado Bruto (gross profit)
rb_q1_2024 = 38242000.0
rb_q1_2025 = 41865000.0
rb_2024 = 167359000.0

# Depreciation (retencoes)
dep_q1_2024 = 5680000.0
dep_q1_2025 = 5760000.0
dep_2024 = 23961000.0

# Financial debt
divida_bruta = emprestimos_curto + emprestimos_longo

# Disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin

# LTM calculations
rev_ltm = rev_2024 + rev_q1_2025 - rev_q1_2024
ebit_ltm = ebit_2024 + ebit_q1_2025 - ebit_q1_2024
net_ltm = net_2024 + net_q1_2025 - net_q1_2024
rb_ltm = rb_2024 + rb_q1_2025 - rb_q1_2024

dep_ltm = dep_2024 + dep_q1_2025 - dep_q1_2024

# EBITDA
ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm + dep_ltm

# Market cap
market_cap = price * shares

# Net debt
div_liq = divida_bruta - disponibilidades

# EV
ev = market_cap + div_liq

# Per share metrics
lpa = net_ltm / shares
vpa = patrimonio_liq / shares
ebit_per_share = ebit_ltm / shares
rev_per_share = rev_ltm / shares
assets_per_share = ativo_total / shares
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares
ativ_circ_liq = ativo_circulante  # ambiguous; use ativo circulante
ativ_circ_liq_per_share = ativo_circulante / shares

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else float('inf')
ppvp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else float('inf')
pp_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
psr = price / rev_per_share if rev_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share!=0 else float('inf')
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / ativ_circ_liq_per_share if ativ_circ_liq_per_share!=0 else float('inf')

ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm!=0 else float('inf')
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else float('inf')

# Margins in percent
marg_bruta = (rb_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else 0
marg_ebit = (ebit_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else 0
marg_liq = (net_ltm / rev_ltm) * 100 if rev_ltm!=0 else 0

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo = (ebit_ltm / ativo_total) * 100 if ativo_total!=0 else 0

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativo_total - fornecedores - caixa
roic = (ebit_ltm / roic_denom) * 100 if roic_denom!=0 else 0

# ROE = Net / Patrimonio
roe = (net_ltm / patrimonio_liq) * 100 if patrimonio_liq!=0 else 0

# Liquidez Corr = Ativo Circulante / Passivo Circulante
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / passivo_circulante if passivo_circulante!=0 else float('inf')

# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = divida_bruta / patrimonio_liq if patrimonio_liq!=0 else float('inf')

# Giro Ativos = rev_ltm / ativo_total
giro_ativos = rev_ltm / ativo_total if ativo_total!=0 else 0

# Prepare outputs (rounding)
def r(x,dec=2):
    if x==float('inf'):
        return None
    return round(x,dec)

outputs = {
    'Ativo': r(ativo_total,2),
    'Disponibilidades': r(disponibilidades,2),
    'Ativo Circulante': r(ativo_circulante,2),
    'Dív. Bruta': r(divida_bruta,2),
    'Dív. Líquida': r(div_liq,2),
    'Patrim. LÍq': r(patrimonio_liq,2),
    'Receita Ldquida (12 meses)': r(rev_ltm,2),
    'EBIT (12 meses)': r(ebit_ltm,2),
    'Lucro Ldquido (12 meses)': r(net_ltm,2),
    'Receita Ldquida (3 meses)': r(rev_q1_2025,2),
    'EBIT (3 meses)': r(ebit_q1_2025,2),
    'Lucro Ldquido (3 meses)': r(net_q1_2025,2),
    'P/L': r(pl,2),
    'P/VP': r(ppvp,2),
    'P/EBIT': r(pp_ebit,2),
    'PSR': r(psr,2),
    'P/Ativos': r(p_ativos,2),
    'P/Cap. Giro': r(p_cap_giro,2),
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': r(p_ativ_circ_liq,2),
    'EV / EBITDA': r(ev_ebitda,2),
    'EV / EBIT': r(ev_ebit,2),
    'LPA': r(lpa,2),
    'VPA': r(vpa,2),
    'Marg. Bruta': r(marg_bruta,2),
    'Marg. EBIT': r(marg_ebit,2),
    'Marg. Ldquida': r(marg_liq,2),
    'EBIT / Ativo': r(ebit_ativo,2),
    'ROIC': r(roic,2),
    'ROE': r(roe,2),
    'Liquidez Corr': r(liquidez_corr,2),
    'Div Br/ Patrim': r(divbr_patrim,2),
    'Giro Ativos': r(giro_ativos,2)
}

# Print for inspection
for k,v in outputs.items():
    print(f"{k}: {v}")

print('\nDetails:')
print('market_cap', market_cap)
print('ev', ev)
print('ebitda_ltm', ebitda_ltm)
print('dep_ltm', dep_ltm)
print('rb_ltm', rb_ltm)

# Provide outputs dict
print('\nOUTPUT_DICT_START')
print(outputs)
print('OUTPUT_DICT_END')
"} }
